title: clusia schultesii
intro: Clusia schultesii, also known as the 'Kokolopa' or 'Kokolopana', is a species of flowering plant in the Clusiaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and bark, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Clusia schultesii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent infections. Traditionally, the plant's leaves and bark are prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in topical applications, such as salves or ointments, to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
